metadata.title: StreetLens
metadata.description: Open street audits for Costa Rica. Mapping sidewalk quality, accessibility, drainage, and shade in Escazú, one segment at a time.

demoBanner.message: Demo data over real street geometry. Field pilot begins August 2026 — no number shown is a real measurement.

map.ariaLabel: Interactive map of audited street segments in Escazú

panel.heroStat: {pct}% of audited segments fail Ley 7600 accessibility minimums
panel.heroDemoNote: Demo figure. Not a real measurement.

detail.demoNote: Demo audit. Real field data replaces this corridor by corridor from August 2026.
detail.communityNote: Community-contributed. Not yet field-verified, so it carries no audit scores.

login.title: Admin access
login.subtitle: Enter the shared admin password to review contributions.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Live figures from the current dataset.
dashboard.demoNote: Demo dataset over real OSM geometry. No figure is a real measurement until field collection begins.

queue.title: Verification queue
queue.empty: The queue is clear. New contributions will appear here.
queue.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you approving or rejecting this?
queue.errorGeneric: Could not save the review. Please try again.
queue.localNote: No database configured. Reviews are staged locally for a post-database apply step.

import.title: Bulk import
import.subtitle: Validate field geometry, then import. Dry-run first — nothing is written until you confirm.
import.fileHint: A GeoJSON FeatureCollection of LineStrings, or a CSV with name, highway, and coordinates columns.
import.verifiedHint: Only for field-team data. A verified import needs an auditor name.
import.emptyState: Choose a file and run validation to see a preview. Nothing is imported yet.
import.commitSuccess: Imported {count} features into the community dataset.
import.noValid: No valid features to import. Fix the errors above and re-validate.
import.auditorRequired: Enter an auditor name to import as verified.
import.errorParse: Could not read the file. Upload a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of LineStrings or a CSV.
import.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
import.localNote: No database configured. Imports are written to the local community dataset.

choose.title: Help map Escazú
choose.subtitle: Add a street we missed, or flag a correction on one we mapped. A reviewer checks every submission before anything changes.
choose.addSegmentHint: Trace the sidewalk on the map
choose.proposeUpdateHint: Pick a mapped segment and tell us what's off

trace.title: Trace the street
trace.hint: Click to drop points along the sidewalk. Double-click, or press Finish, when you reach the end.
trace.points: {count, plural, =0 {No points yet} one {# point} other {# points}}
trace.needMore: Add at least two points to continue.

followStreets.label: Follow streets
followStreets.warning: Couldn't follow streets for part of this path. Those spans are drawn dashed.

select.title: Pick a segment
select.hint: Click any mapped street to propose a correction to it.

form.conditionsHint: Answer what you can. Skip anything you're unsure about.
form.notePlaceholder: A short note for the reviewer.
form.reasonPlaceholder: Tell the reviewer what's wrong or out of date.
form.contactPlaceholder: Email, only if you'd like a reply
form.contactHint: Never published. Used only to follow up on your submission.
form.photoSoon: Photo upload arrives with the field pilot. For now, describe it in your note.
form.pathPoints: {count, plural, one {Path traced · # point} other {Path traced · # points}}
form.honestNote: Submissions land as pending proposals. Nothing on the public map changes until a reviewer approves it.

success.title: Submitted for review
success.body: Thank you. Your proposal is pending review. A reviewer will check it before anything on the map changes.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: You've sent a few submissions quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalid: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
